description: User clicks on the browser tab for the Sessions.us video call to switch away from the travel insurance form.
frame_description: The cursor is at the top of the browser window, clicking on one of the open tabs.

description: The browser switches to the Sessions.us video call page.
frame_description: The page content changes from the travel insurance form to the video conferencing interface.

description: User hovers the cursor over several application icons in the macOS dock at the bottom of the screen.
frame_description: The cursor moves horizontally across the bottom of the screen over the dock icons.

description: Tooltips for various applications (OneNote, Music, iPhone Mirroring, TV) appear sequentially as the user hovers over the dock icons.
frame_description: Text labels appear and disappear above the dock icons in response to cursor movement.

description: User clicks the 'Stop sharing' button in the Sessions.us control bar to end the screen sharing session.
frame_description: The cursor is on the green 'Stop sharing' button at the bottom of the screen.
